name: Rich Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Press the Chocolate Wafer Crust mixture on the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Pre-bake according to crust recipe directions.
3. Place chocolate morsels in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts.
5. Beat cream cheese at high speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add sugar, mixing well.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Stir in melted chocolate, cocoa, and vanilla; beat until blended.
9. Stir in sour cream, blending well.
10. Pour into prepared pan.
11. Bake at 300 degrees for 1 hour and 40 minutes (center may be soft but will firm when chilled).
12. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
13. Chill at least 8 hours.
14. Garnish each serving with whipped cream.
Yield: 10 to 12 servings
